questionHtml: Using the information in Table 3, calculate Sierra Leone’s rate of economic growth between 2017 and 2018.
markschemeHtml:
(3617 − 3497)/3497 × 100 % [1]

Any valid working should be rewarded with [1]

= 3.43 % [1]

Award [1] for the correct economic growth rate without workings or without the % sign or for a figure rounded to less than 2 dp.

meta.title: Using the information in Table 3, calculate Sierra Leone’s rate of economic growth between 2017 and 2018.
